name: French Onion Soup with Croutons
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice the onions finely.
2. Sauté the onions in butter until they are tender.
3. Add water, chicken bouillon cubes, beef bouillion cubes, and Kitchen Bouquet to a pot.
4. Simmer for 20 minutes.
5. Add croutons and serve.
6. Toast bread slices under the broiler.
7. Spread butter, salt, pepper, garlic, paprika, and Parmesan cheese on the toasted bread.
8. Dice the prepared bread.
